case_title: DONALD CARMIGNANI VS. KENNETH GROEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-05-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-25-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST MICHAEL MCCLOSKEY, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-05-2017, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-26-2017. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARMIGNANI, DONALD AS TO DEFENDANT GROEN, KENNETH DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-13-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-12-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-21-2017
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-13-2017 CONTINUED TO OCT-25-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-10-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-05-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 17355022)
